source.update_note: 2026-27 upland game bird data from CDFW. California has quail (3 zones), pheasant, chukar, grouse, ptarmigan, and turkey. Nonlead ammunition required statewide.

species.name: Quail (Zone Q1 — Northeast)
species.season_raw: Mountain Quail only: Sep 12-Oct 16; All quail: Oct 17 - Jan 31

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant
species.season_raw: General: Nov 14 - Dec 27; Archery: Oct 10 - Nov 1 & Dec 28 - Jan 24; Falconry: Aug 15 - Feb 28
species.bag_limit: 2 males first 2 days, then 3 males (archery: 1 female allowed)

species.name: Wild Turkey (Spring)
species.season_raw: General: Mar 27 - May 2; Archery: May 3-16. Junior: Mar 20-21 & May 3-16.

licenses.name: Upland Game Bird Validation
licenses.covers: Required in addition to license for upland game birds (not required for Junior license holders)

licenses.name: Nonlead Ammunition (Required)
licenses.covers: Nonlead ammunition required when taking any wildlife with a firearm anywhere in California

key_notes.title: Nonlead ammunition is required when taking any wildlife with a firearm anywhere in California. Lead shot is prohibited for all hunting.

sources.label: CDFW — Nonlead Requirement
sources.evidence: Nonlead Ammunition required when taking any wildlife with a firearm anywhere in California.

key_notes.title: California has 3 quail zones (Q1, Q2, Q3) with different season opening dates. Zone Q1 has a mountain quail-only early season.

sources.label: CDFW — Quail Zones
sources.evidence: Q1: Mountain quail only Sep 12-Oct 16, all quail Oct 17-Jan 31. Q2: Sep 26-Jan 31. Q3: Oct 17-Jan 31.

key_notes.title: Pheasant season is Nov 14 - Dec 27 (general), with archery-only seasons Oct 10 - Nov 1 and Dec 28 - Jan 24. Bag is 2 males first 2 days then 3 males.

sources.label: CDFW — Pheasant Season
sources.evidence: Pheasant: General Nov 14-Dec 27. Archery: Oct 10-Nov 1 & Dec 28-Jan 24. 2 males first 2 days, 3 males thereafter.

key_notes.title: White-tailed ptarmigan has a very short season (Sep 12-20) with a 2-bird season limit. Found in high alpine areas of the Sierra Nevada.

sources.label: CDFW — Ptarmigan Season
sources.evidence: White-tailed Ptarmigan: Sep 12-20. 2 daily, 2 per season limit.
